The Homegirl Memo
Vent. Receive. Heal.

Spill It — I'll
Write Back

You know how you text your homegirl at 2am and she actually gets it? That's this — but better. Send me your situation, your vent, your “I don't even know where to start” — and I'll send you a real, personalized response within 48 hours.

No judgment. No generic advice. Just your homegirl Nik — reading every word and writing back from the heart. Because sometimes you just need someone who's been there to tell you what you need to hear.
